name: WORLD'S HOTTEST CORN CHIPS 50G
description:
These world's hottest corn chips are reserved for the insane!

Our mates at Chilli Seed Bank have produced an awesome product that we're thrilled to be offering. With Carolina Reaper, Scorpion and Bhut Jolokia all infused into these bad boys you know you'll be flying high on just one chip!

Not for sooks, is our best advice...and try just one before eating a handful!

**** WARNING THESE CHIPS ARE EXTREMELY HOT ****
